items.text: · Free car seat checks are underway across PA! Our certified technicians inspect child passenger safety seats for suitability, check for recalls, and perform installations. Find an event near you, from May 11-31, at http:// bit.ly/PSPchildseat.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 10 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Leehsia Reeves was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 10 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Charles Pelzer was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 8 Community Awareness Bulletin 01-2026: Scams Associated with Major Events. View the PDF at http:// bit.ly/PSP-CAB126. Community Awareness Bulletins examine emerging crime trends and safety issues.

· May 7 Trooper Abhaisingh of Troop F visited Wyoming Seminary and Preschool. He read them a book and made them all Junior Troopers with their very own big hats. The tour of the patrol car was a big hit!

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 6 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Juan Figueroa-Cruz was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.
